summary: Completed comprehensive role-based system testing - all features working correctly
passed_tests: Manager and Supervisor registration with role/category selection
Google Maps auto-assignment to Google Maps supervisor
Supervisor sees only assigned requests (filtered correctly)
Manager has Team Management tab access
Supervisor does not have Team Management tab (correctly hidden)
Manager badge displays correctly on dashboard
Supervisor badge displays correctly on dashboard
Manager can reassign requests via assignment dropdown
Supervisor cannot access assignment dropdown (correctly restricted)
Role-based stats filtering (Manager: all stats, Supervisor: assigned only)
Team Management displays all users with roles and departments
Request headers show 'All Branch Requests' for Manager, 'My Assigned Requests' for Supervisor
Backend API endpoints respect role-based access control
403 errors correctly returned for unauthorized supervisor access to /users endpoint
